title: Alert Dialog
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Alert Dialog wrapper composed from the local Base UI Alert Dialog primitive, shadcn Button classes, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, inline icon markup, and deterministic local examples.

examples.title: AlertDialogBasic
examples.description: Basic account deletion confirmation alert dialog.

examples.title: AlertDialogDestructive
examples.description: Destructive chat deletion confirmation with media icon.

examples.title: AlertDialogWithMedia
examples.description: Project sharing confirmation with media icon.

examples.title: AlertDialogSmallWithMedia
examples.description: Small accessory confirmation with media icon.

examples.title: AlertDialogRtl
examples.description: RTL alert dialog pair with deterministic local translations.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Alert Dialog attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Trigger, cancel, and action surfaces use the local shadcn Button class helper instead of origin React render composition.
deviations.rationale: The local Button registry item provides the same base-nova class contract without React runtime composition.

deviations.summary: Examples use local deterministic translations and open-state shells rather than origin app-level language-selector state.
deviations.rationale: The language selector is outside this component slice. Static local data preserves the relevant Alert Dialog DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts.

deviations.summary: Media icons are local inline SVG markup instead of lucide-react runtime imports.
deviations.rationale: lucide-react is not an installable runtime dependency for this registry item.
